with open\('com/hereliesaz/aznavrail/AzNavRailScopeImpl.class', 'rb'\) as f:
    data = f.read\(\)

import struct
strings = []
i = 8  # skip magic + version
const_count = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i:i+2]\)[0]
i += 2
for _ in range\(const_count - 1\):
    tag = data[i]
    if tag == 1:  # CONSTANT_Utf8
        length = struct.unpack\('>H', data[i+1:i+3]\)[0]
        s = data[i+3:i+3+length]
        try:
            decoded = s.decode\('utf-8'\)
            if any\(x in decoded for x in ['onClick', 'content', 'onFocus', 'param']\):
                print\(f"'{decoded[:100]}'"\)
        except:
            pass
        i += 3 + length
    elif tag in \(7,8,16,19,20\): i += 3
    elif tag in \(9,10,11,12,17,18\): i += 5
    elif tag in \(3,4,18\): i += 5
    elif tag in \(5,6\): i += 9; _ += 1  # consumes two slots
    elif tag == 15: i += 4
    else: 
        break
EOF)

Bash(cd /tmp && python3 - << 'EOF'
import zipfile, re

jar_path = "/home/az/.gradle/caches/9.4.0-rc-1/transforms/c7d4d32d12fad78164caa0360644f057/transformed/AzNavRail-7.71/jars/classes.jar"
with zipfile.ZipFile\(jar_path\) as z:
    data = z.read\("com/hereliesaz/aznavrail/AzNavRailScope.class"\)

raw = data.decode\('latin-1'\)

# Extract all UTF8 constant strings \(preceded by \\x01\\x00 length prefix in class format\)
# Find 3-30 char lowercase camelCase identifiers
all_ids = re.findall\(r'\\b\([a-z][a-zA-Z0-9]{2,25}\)\\b', raw\)
# Filter to likely param names
param_like = [s for s in set\(all_ids\) if any\(c.isupper\(\) for c in s[1:]\) or s in ['id','text','icon','tags','shape','color','title','label','content']]
print\("Parameter-like identifiers:", sorted\(param_like\)\)
EOF)
